raw_text: aboutme lam a final-year aerospace engineering student with professional experience in the aeronautical sector. have worked in multidisciplinary teams and held positions of responsibility under pressure. consider myself organized, sociable, and strongly committed to my duties. contact manuteo26@gmail.es +34 697 509 708 manuel mateo carmona idiomas spanish: native language english: advanced level cl certificate - 2022 italian: basic french: basic hobbies passionate cyclist and sports enthusiast. former competitive rower and gold medalist at the spanish national championships. deeply interested in automotive engineering, which has led me to compete on formula 1 circuits. enjoy meeting people from diverse backgrounds and believe experience is the best form of learning. manuel mat aerospace engineer edugation 2019 - 2024 e specialization in aerospace vehicles and structures a politecnico milano 1863 first semester 2022 - 2023 studied aerospace egineering courses at politecnico di milano, with instruction entirely in english, in an international and multicultural environment experienge andalucia racing team march 2022 - october2024 responsible for the design and assembly management ofthe art24d single-seater. led cfd simulations and performance analysis for aerodynamic development, including the teams first deflectors system. participated in the manufacturing of the aero package in composites. represented the team in design presentations evaluated by fl engineers. gained hands-on experience in trackside problem- solving during competitions in germany and testing at the jerez angel nieto circuit. airbus xplorer internship: february 2025 - july 2025 thesis on value stream mapping of the final assembly and functional testing process of the a400m. cross-functional understanding of the fal. applied lean methodology to reduce build process hours. familiar with tools and tasks of the manufacturing engineering department. skills catia v5: advanced design of wings using surface design, part design, and assembly design modules. excel: proficient in data handling and task automation using python (pandas). otros: ultimaker cura, altair hypermesh, patran-nastran , stk, fusion (cnc machining).
